title: Game Night - May 21, 2022
recap: Canadian Salad: Jake Klein won Canadian Salad with 0 points. Poker: Jake Klein won Poker.
highlights: Jake Klein won Canadian Salad with 0 points.
Jake Klein won Poker.

games.notes: Clark throws the game with the last hand in Canadian salad. Mitch and Jake tie and draw for high card to win. Jake wins by drawing a Ace of hearts.

Jeremy out first, Hicks out next, Mitch goes out and agrees to be all time dealer. Clark knocked out by Jake but really went down hill due to music change (You're the best around). John knocks out Brandon. Big blind is 32. Jake knocks out John and wins $70.

title: Game Night - Dec 9, 2023
recap: Poker: Clark Close won Poker. Hearts: Mike Chan won Hearts with 56 points.
highlights: Clark Close won Poker.
Mike Chan won Hearts with 56 points.

games.notes: Jake was winning the entire game handily. Clark and Mitch both went all in on the last hand and Clark won with ace high over jack high. All that combined total chips barely surpased Jake. Mitch had tears, Clark had tears, Jake was pissed.
